feeds.name: 1d
feeds.description: Public entries from the last 24 hours (wall-clock cutoff).

feeds.name: 7d
feeds.description: Public entries from the last 7 days (wall-clock cutoff).

feeds.name: 1m
feeds.description: Public entries from the last 30 days (wall-clock cutoff).

feeds.name: flagged
feeds.description: Public entries marked flagged (always-surface, regardless of date).

feeds.name: scope:docs
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'docs', all-time.

feeds.name: scope:infra
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'infra', all-time.

feeds.name: scope:motd
feeds.description: Message-of-the-day banners. Each entry's `date` is the UTC day it is active and `title` is the banner text; consumed by pilot-daemon, not part of the changelog.

feeds.name: scope:networks
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'networks', all-time.

feeds.name: scope:ops
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'ops', all-time.

feeds.name: scope:protocol
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'protocol', all-time.

feeds.name: scope:skills
feeds.description: All public entries scoped to 'skills', all-time.
